title: erythroxylum grisebachii
intro: Erythroxylum grisebachii is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the Grisebach's coca or wild coca. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate the brain and nervous system, and to relieve fatigue and headaches. The health benefits of Erythroxylum grisebachii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and boost energy levels. Erythroxylum grisebachii is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
